mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prplchecktask (checklongitude, checklatitude, checkdate, checksite) VALUES (#{checklongitude}, #{checklatitude}, #{checkdate}, #{checksite})
mapper.update: UPDATE prplchecktask SET checklongitude = #{checklongitude}, checklatitude = #{checklatitude}, checkdate = #{checkdate}, checksite = #{checksite} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT checklongitude AS lng, checklatitude AS lat FROM prplchecktask WHERE checkdate = #{date} AND checklongitude IS NOT NULL AND checklatitude IS NOT NULL AND checklongitude != 0 AND checklatitude != 0 AND checklongitude BETWEEN 102.5 AND 104.9 AND checklatitude BETWEEN 30.0 AND 31.5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prplchecktask WHERE checkdate = #{date}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prplchecktask WHERE checkdate = #{date} AND checksite IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(checksite) != '' AND (checklongitude IS NULL OR checklatitude IS NULL OR checklongitude = 0 OR checklatitude = 0 OR checklongitude < 102.5 OR checklongitude > 104.9 OR checklatitude < 30.0 OR checklatitude > 31.5)
